module.name: Check Resolution
module.description: Mechanism for resolving checks (d20 + modifier vs DC) and degrees of success or failure; includes skill checks, opposed checks, and resistance checks.

concepts.name: Check
concepts.owns: Determines success or failure by comparing roll result to DC; produces degree of success or failure.

concepts.name: DifficultyClass
concepts.owns: Target number for a check; varies by task (e.g. DC 10 simple to DC 25+ advanced).

epic.name: Resolve Check
epic.statement: **Player** or **System** rolls d20 + modifier; result is compared to DC to determine degree of success or failure.

module.name: Conflict and Actions
module.description: Action round, initiative order, and action types (standard, move, free, reaction) during conflicts.

concepts.name: ActionRound
concepts.owns: Orders turns by initiative; constrains what actions (standard, move, free, reaction) can be taken.

concepts.name: Initiative
concepts.owns: Determines order of action in conflict (d20 + initiative modifier).

epic.name: Run Action Round
epic.statement: **System** establishes initiative order; **Player** and **System** take actions (standard, move, free, reaction) within the round.

module.name: Damage and Recovery
module.description: Damage resistance check (Toughness vs rank+15), degrees of failure (penalty, dazed, staggered, incapacitated, dying), and recovery.

concepts.name: DamageResistance
concepts.owns: Resolves damage effect via Toughness check; applies degree-based conditions (penalty, dazed, staggered, incapacitated, dying).

concepts.name: Recovery
concepts.owns: Removes damage conditions over time (e.g. one condition per minute of rest); Healing/Regeneration can speed this.

epic.name: Resolve Damage
epic.statement: **System** resolves damage resistance check; **Target** receives condition by degree of failure; recovery removes conditions over time.

module.name: Character Traits
module.description: Allocation of power points to abilities, skills, advantages, powers, and complications; constrained by power level.

concepts.name: PowerPoint
concepts.owns: Budget for buying abilities, skills, advantages, powers (1 PP per advantage or rank; abilities/skills/powers have costs).

concepts.name: Advantage
concepts.owns: Character option purchased with power points (1 per advantage or rank).

epic.name: Build Character
epic.statement: **Player** spends power points on abilities, skills, advantages, powers, and details within power level limits.

module.name: Powers and Effects
module.description: Power effects, modifiers (extras and flaws), descriptors, and cost; application of effects in conflict.

concepts.name: Effect
concepts.owns: Named mechanical effect (e.g. Weaken, Damage) with rank, modifiers, and cost; may be noticeable or subtle.

concepts.name: Modifier
concepts.owns: Extra or flaw that changes effect cost or behavior (e.g. Removable, Concentration, Affects Objects).

epic.name: Configure Power
epic.statement: **Player** defines effects with rank, modifiers, and descriptors; **System** enforces cost and PL limits.

cross_cutting_notes: Condition (e.g. Weakened, dazed, staggered) appears in both Conflict and Actions and Damage and Recovery; may be [cross-cutting] once deepened. Check (roll vs DC) is used by resistance checks in Damage and by skill/opposed checks in Check Resolution.
